Pak Study MCQs · pages 901-950

Sharpen your Pak Study recall

Tap a card to reveal the explanation. Take it one seal at a time.

500 questions in this set
1

Congress Ministers in 1937 established ministries in :

Correct Answer: 5 provinces
Show explanation
Explanation

Parliament has formed governments in United, Bihar, Chubu, Bombay, and Madras.


The party's election program downplayed South Asian sectarianism

Nehru continued this stance by launching a mass contact program for Islam in March 1937.

2

What is the range of the Agni-ll missile of India?

Correct Answer: 2000 km
Show explanation
Explanation
  • 2,000 km is the range of the Agni-ll missile of India
  • ***
  • The Agni-II is an Indian medium-range ballistic missile (MRBM) with a range of over 2,000 km

  • India conducted the first night trial of a nuclear-capable intermediate-range ballistic missile Agni-II from the Abdul Kalam Island of the Odisha coast on 16 Nov 2019. 
    **
Agni (missile)
NameTypeRange
Agni-IIMRBM2,000–3,500 km (Operational)
Agni-IIIIRBM3,000–5,000 km (Operational)
Agni-IVIRBM3,500–4,000 km(Operational)
Agni-VICBM5,500–8,000 km (Operational)
3

Does Gilgit-Baltistan border Urgur autonomous region was?

Correct Answer: XINJIANG
Show explanation
Explanation

 Gilgit-Baltistan border Urgur autonomous region was XINJIANG

4

Setting a new precedent, Pakistan for the first time in its 70 years history appointed a female diplomat in ______?

Correct Answer: Saudi Arabia
Show explanation
Explanation

Pakistan has appointed its first female consular, Fozia Fayyaz Ahmed, at Consulate General Pakistan Jeddah, Saudi Arabia.

Precedent : Justification

Correct Answer: Authority: Sanction
Show explanation
Explanation

Precedent : Justification

Authority: Sanction

6

Which nation has fined NBP more than $55 million for non compliance?

Correct Answer: USA
Show explanation
Explanation

The National Bank of Pakistan (NBP) has been fined more than $55 million by United States authorities for anti-money laundering violations and for repeated compliance failures, it emerged on 24-02-2022.

7

which Asian Country gained independence from the Great British in 1919?

Correct Answer: Afghanistan
Show explanation
Explanation
  • Afghanistan is an Asian Country that gained independence from Great British in 1919
  • **
  • Although Afghanistan was never part of the British Empire,
  • It gained its independence from Britain after the signing of the Anglo-Afghan Treaty in 1919 – a treaty that granted complete neutral relations between Afghanistan and Britain.
8

Shuddhi and sangthan movements were started at the end of:

Correct Answer: Treek e Khilafat
Show explanation
Explanation

    • Shuddhi and Sangathan movements were started at the end of Tehreek e Khilafat
    • ***
    • The Shuddhi movement was started by Swami Dayanand Saraswati

    • The Shuddhi movement was started in 1923
    • ***
  • Shuddhi Movement was started by Arya Samaj to bring back the people who transformed their religion to Islam and Christianity from Hinduism
9

who had the longest period of rule on his credit?

Correct Answer: Gen. Zia-ul-Haq
Show explanation
Explanation
  •  Gen. Zia-ul-Haq had the longest period of rule on his credit.
  • **
  • Gen Ziaul Haq ruled the country for the longest 11 years, one month and 12 days followed by Ayub Khan who remained the president 
10

after the fall of Dakah on 16th Dec 1971, Mr Zulfikar Ali Bhutto look over the control of Pakistan 20th Dec 1971 was

Correct Answer: Chief Martial Law Administrate President
Show explanation
Explanation
  • after the fall of Dakah on 16th Dec 1971, Mr Zulfikar  Ali Bhutto look over the control of Pakistan 20th Dec  1971 was  Chief Martial Law Administrate President 
  • ***
  • Bhutto c. 1971
  • 4th President of Pakistan
  • Chief Martial Law Administrator
  • 20 December 1971 – 13 August 1973
11

which plan area is located in the South of Salt Range and east of Sulemania Maintains?

Correct Answer: Upper Indus plain
Show explanation
Explanation

The Upper Indus plain area is located in the South of the Salt Range and east of Sulemania

The highest peak of salt range is Soan Sakaser

The Salt Range is a mountain range in the north of the Punjab province of Pakistan

The range extends along the south of the Potohar Plateau and the north of the Jhelum River.

The salt range is situated between rivers Soan and River Jhelum

Sakesar (Khushab District) is the highest mountain in the salt region
675 meters is the average height of the salt range

******

ND17-7-2023

12

As of 17 September, how many people killed in Pakistan due to flood in since June 2022?

Correct Answer: 1500
Show explanation
Explanation

The catastrophic floods in Pakistan have killed more than 15,10 people, destroyed infrastructure and crops, and affected 33 million people.

13

Pakistan observed a national day of mourning on ________ over the death of Queen Elizabeth II.

Correct Answer: September 12
Show explanation
Explanation
  • Pakistan observed a national day of mourning on  September 12 over the death of Queen Elizabeth II.
  • Queen Elizabeth II, the longest serving monarch of United Kingdom passed away on 8 September at the age of 96 in Scotland. 
14

which organ of the United NATIONAL passed resolutions to hold in the state of Jammu and Kashmir in 1948?

Correct Answer: security council
Show explanation
Explanation
  • security council organ of the United NATIONAL passed resolutions to hold in the state of Jammu and Kashmir in 1948.
  • ***
  • the first Indian PM Jawaharlal Nehru backed out of his promise of a plebiscite in Kashmir in 1948 on the pretext of Pakistan had joined SEATO and CENTO
  • ***
    The Secretary-General is appointed by the General Assembly, on the recommendation of the Security Council.
  • Established October 24, 1947 (Azad Kashmir Day)
  • Capital Muzaffarabad
  • Largest city Muzaffarabad
  • Self-governing state under Pakistani administration
15

Where the Kashmir issue was presented in 1948?

Correct Answer: Security Council
Show explanation
Explanation

India first took the Kashmir dispute to the United Nations on 1 January 1948.

16

Which martyrdom anniversary of Major Raja Aziz Bhatti Shaheed observed on 12 September 2022?

Correct Answer: 57th
Show explanation
Explanation
  • The 57th Martyrdom Anniversary of Major Raja Aziz Bhatti Shaheed, Nishan-e-Haider, observed on 12 September 2022.   
  • Maj Aziz Bhatti Shaheed was born in Hong Kong in 1928 and moved to Pakistan before independence in 1947, settling in Ladiyan village of district Gujrat.
  • In 1950, he joined Pakistan Army and was commissioned in Punjab Regiment.
  • On 12 September 1965 during Indo-Pak War he embraced Shahadat while fighting bravely at Burki Lahore.
17

بہاول نگر کا پڑانا نام کیا ہے؟

Correct Answer: Rojhan Wali Basti
Show explanation
Explanation

بہاولنگر کا پرانا نام روجھان والی بستی تھا۔

***

اس کا نام 1904 میں بہاول خان پنجم کے نام پر رکھا گیا۔

بہاولنگر گندم کے استعمال اور لسی پینے کے لیے مشہور ہے۔

بہاولنگر 1723 سے 1947 تک، ضلع بہاولپور کا حصہ۔

18

Queen Elizabeth II also remained monarch of Pakistan from 6 February 1952 to:

Correct Answer: 23 March 1956
Show explanation
Explanation
  • Know everything about Queen Elizabeth II
  • Queen Elizabeth died on 8 September 2022 in Scotland.
  • Queen Elizabeth II was born in Mayfair, London on 21 April 1926.
  • Elizabeth became Queen on 6 February 1952 after the death of her father King George.
  • Elizabeth became Queen at the age of 25.
  • Elizabeth administrated oath to the 15th Prime minister of UK Liz Truss on 6 September 2022 (2 days before death).
  • Elizabeth II is the first female monarch to have the longest reign in British history.
  • Elizabeth reigned over 70 years and 214, longest of any British monarch.
  • Elizabeth II was also the queen of 14 other commonwealth realms in addition to the UK.
  • Elizabeth visited Pakistan in 1961 & 1997.
  • Elizabeth II also remained monarch of Pakistan from 6 February 1952 to 23 March 1956.
  • Her eldest son Charles, automatically became king of the United Kingdom and the head of state of 14 other realms including Australia, Canada and New Zealand.
19

Who became first female Deputy Commissioner in the administrative history of Balochistan?

Correct Answer: Ayesha Zehri
Show explanation
Explanation
  • The Balochistan government on September 6, 2022 appointed Ayesha Zehri to serve as deputy commissioner of Nasirabad district.
  • It was the first time in the administrative history of Balochistan that a female officer was appointed as deputy commissioner of any district in the province.

20

NDMA stands for:

Correct Answer: National Disaster Management Authority
Show explanation
Explanation

National Disaster Management Authority is an autonomous and constitutionally established federal authority mandated to deal with the whole spectrum of disasters, founded in 2007.

21

Five army men martyred in _________ on 5 September 2022.

Correct Answer: North Waziristan
Show explanation
Explanation

A young army officer and four soldiers were martyred in an exchange of fire with terrorists that took place when security forces conducted an intelligence-based operation in the Boyya area of North Waziristan tribal district on September 5, 2022.

 

22

Who mediated 1965 war

Correct Answer: Aleksey Kosygin
Show explanation
Explanation
  • The 1965 war between India and Pakistan was the second conflict between the two countries over the status of the state of Jammu and Kashmir.
  • The agreement was mediated by Soviet premier Aleksey Kosygin, who had invited the parties to Tashkent
23

1965 war monuments were built over the ______?

Correct Answer: State of Jammu and Kashmir
Show explanation
Explanation

The 1965 war between India and Pakistan was the second conflict between the two countries over the status of the state of Jammu and Kashmir.

24

The Indus Valley Civilization Valley is known as a pre-Aryan Civilization because of the evidence of:

Correct Answer: Copper
Show explanation
Explanation
  • The Indus Valley Civilization Valley is known as a pre-Aryan Civilization because of the evidence of Copper
  • ***
  • The Indus valley people knew the use of Gold, Silver, Copper, and Bronze but not iron
  • Indus Valley Civilization was spread over Sindh, Punjab, Jammu and Kashmir, U.P, Rajasthan, Gujarat
  • The Indus Valley Civilisation, also known as the Indus Civilisation.
  • In Indus Valley “Alluvial Soil” was used for making Bricks
  • The Great Bath of the Indus Valley Civilization was discovered in Mohenjodaro
  • The Indus Valley Civilization belongs to the Neolithic age
  • The main occupation of the people of the Indus valley civilization was: Agriculture
  • Period: Bronze Age South Asia




25

ـــــــــــ کے منٹو مارلے اصلاحات میں مسلمانوں کے جداگانہ انتخابات کا حق تسلیم کیا گیا تھا۔

Correct Answer: 1909
Show explanation
Explanation

The Indian Councils Act 1909 , also known as Minto-Morley Reforms, was an Act of the Parliament of the United Kingdom that brought about a limited increase in the involvement of Indians in the governance of British India.

26

آخری مغل بادشاہ کون تھاـــــــــــــــ؟

Correct Answer: بہادر شاہ ظفر
Show explanation
Explanation
  • بہادر شاہ ظفر آخری مغل بادشاہ تھے۔
  • بہادر شاہ ظفر رنگون میں مدفون ہیں۔
27

ــــــــــــــــ نے ہندوستان میں مغل حکومت کی بنیاد رکھی۔

Correct Answer: ظہیرالدین بابر
Show explanation
Explanation
  • ظہیرالدین بابر نے ہندوستان میں مغل حکومت کی بنیاد رکھی۔
  • ظہیرالدین بابر نے 1526 میں ہندوستان میں مغل حکومت کی بنیاد رکھی۔
  • ظہیرالدین بابر نے کابل میں مدفون ہیں۔

28

ــــــــــــــ پاکستان کے پہلے سائنسدان تھے جنہوں نے نوبل انعام اپنے نام کیا تھا۔

Correct Answer: عبدالسلام
Show explanation
Explanation
  • ڈاکٹر عبدالسلام پاکستان کے پہلے سائنسدان تھے جنہوں نے نوبل انعام اپنے نام کیا تھا۔
  • ڈاکٹر عبدالسلام  کو 1979 میں نوبل پرائز دیاگیا تھا۔
  • ڈاکٹر عبدالسلام  1996 میں انتقال کرگئے۔
29

ملالہ یوسفزئی نے ـــــــــــــــــــ میں امن نوبل پرائز اپنے نام کیا۔

Correct Answer: 2014
Show explanation
Explanation
  • ملالہ یوسفزئی نے 2014 میں امن نوبل پرائز اپنے نام کیا۔
  • پاکستان میں نوبل پرائز حاصل کرنے والوں میں ملالہ یوسفزئی کا دوسرا نمبر ہے۔
  • ملالہ ڈے 12 جولائی کو منایا جاتا ہے۔

Correct Answer: Five
Show explanation
Explanation
  • Pakistan defeated India by 5 wickets in Super Four match of the Asia Cup 2022.
  • Played at: Dubai International Cricket Stadium
  • Played: 4 September 2022

Pakistan won Super Four match of Asia Cup by defeating which country on 4 September 2022?

Correct Answer: India

Explanation
  • Pakistan defeated India by 5 wickets in Super Four match of the Asia Cup 2022.
  • Played at: Dubai International Cricket Stadium
  • Played: 4 September 2022
32

سملی ڈیم کہا ہے؟

Correct Answer: اسلام آباد
Show explanation
Explanation
  • سملی ڈیم اسلام آباد اور راولپنڈی پنجاب، پاکستان میں موجود ہے۔
  • ****
  • سملی ڈیم دریائے سوان پر 80 میٹر اونچا مٹی کا پشتا بند ہے،

  • جو اسلام آباد اور راولپنڈی سے 30 کلومیٹر مشرق میں راولپنڈی، پنجاب، پاکستان میں واقع ہے۔
33

رقبے کے لحظ سے پاکستان کا سب سے بڑا ضلع کون سا ہے؟

Correct Answer: چاغی
Show explanation
Explanation
  • چاغی رقبے کے لحاظ سے پاکستان کا سب سے بڑا ضلع ہے
  • ***
  • چاغی رقبے کے لحاظ سے پاکستان کا سب سے بڑا ضلع ہے۔

  • چاغی کا کل رقبہ 44,748 کلومیٹر 2 (17,277 مربع میل)
  • ***
  • ضلع چترال صوبہ خیبر پختونخوا کا سب سے بڑا ضلع ہے۔

  • ضلع تورگھر یا تور گھر (جس کا مطلب ہے "کالا پہاڑ")، پہلے کالا ڈھاکہ، پاکستان کا سب سے چھوٹا ضلع ہے
  • ***
  • جبکہ لاہور ضلع 2017 کی مردم شماری میں 11,126,285 کی کل آبادی کے ساتھ آبادی کے لحاظ سے سب سے بڑا ہے۔
34

پاکستان میں فاٹا کا علا قا کتنا ہے؟

Correct Answer: 2.4%
Show explanation
Explanation
35

اسلام آباد کو کونسے ڈیم سے پانی ملتا ہے؟

Correct Answer: خان پور
Show explanation
Explanation
  • خان پور ڈیم پراجیکٹ ضلع ہری پور (خیبر پختونخوا) اور ضلع راولپنڈی اور اٹک (پنجاب) کے ملحقہ علاقوں کو آبپاشی کے لیے پانی کی باقاعدہ فراہمی فراہم کرتا ہے۔

  •  یہ اسلام آباد اور راولپنڈی کے میونسپل پانی کی ضروریات کو بھی پورا کرتا ہے۔

  •  خانپور ریزروائر کا لائیو سٹوریج 79,980 ایکڑ فٹ ہے۔
36

ندر شاہ نے کونسے ہجری میں دہلی کو فتحح کیا

Correct Answer: 1739
Show explanation
Explanation
  • ندر شاہ نے 1739  ہجری میں دہلی کو فتحح کیا
  • ****
  • On 13 February 1739, Nadir Shah crushed the Mughal army in less than three hours
37

انگریز سرکار نے تقسیم بنگال کو کب منسوخ کیا؟

Correct Answer: 1911
Show explanation
Explanation

Ø  Partition of Bangal Announced on 19 July 1905 by Lord Curzon for Administrative requirements

Ø  Swadeshi movement was started by Gandhi for annulment of partition of Bangal.

****

Ø  On the visiting His Majesty King George V to Indo-Pakistan and holding of Darbar at Delhi on 12th December 1911 the partition of Bengal was cancelled.
38

The members of Punjab Assembly are?

Correct Answer: 371
Show explanation
Explanation
  • The Provincial Assembly of Punjab will have a total of 371 seats:
  • 297 general seats,
  • 66 reserved for women,
  • 8 reserved for non-Muslims.
39

ڈاکٹر عبدالسلام کس مضمون میں ماہر تھے

Correct Answer: فز کس
Show explanation
Explanation
  • ڈاکٹر عبدالسلام فز کس میں ماہر تھے

  • ****
  • سلام نوبل انعام جیتنے والے پہلے پاکستانی اور پہلے مسلمان سائنسدان تھے۔

  • 1964

میں اس نے تیسری دنیا کے ممالک کے طبیعیات دانوں کو مدد فراہم کرنے کے لیے ٹریسٹی، اٹلی میں بین الاقوامی مرکز برائے

نظریاتی طبیعیات کی تلاش میں مدد کی۔


  • انہوں نے اپنی موت تک مرکز کے ڈائریکٹر کے طور پر خدمات انجام دیں۔
40

پاکستان کے پہلے نیول چیف کو ن تھے

Correct Answer: جیمزول فرڈ
Show explanation
Explanation
  •  اگست 1947 رائل پاکستان نیوی وجود میں آئی۔

  •  ریئر ایڈمرل جیمز ولفرڈ جیفرڈ کو رائل پاکستان نیوی کا پہلا کمانڈر ان چیف مقرر کیا گیا

  • ***

وائس ایڈمرل حسن حفیظ احمد پاکستان نیوی کے ایک سینئر افسر تھے جنہوں نے 1972 سے لے کر 1975 میں بیماری سے اپنی موت تک

پاکستان نیوی کے پہلے چیف آف نیول اسٹاف (CNS) کے طور پر خدمات انجام دیں۔

41

پاکستان کا سب سے بڑا ہسپتال ____________ ہے؟

Correct Answer: نشتر ہسپتال ملتان
Show explanation
Explanation
  • نشتر ہسپتال بلاک کی تعمیر 1953 میں شروع ہوئی تھی۔
  • بنیادی خیال اور اس کا منصوبہ ڈاکٹر ایم جے بھٹہ نے فراہم کیا تھا۔

  • اس کا نام سردار عبدالرب نشتر کے نام پر رکھا گیا ہے، جو ایک پاکستانی تحریک کے کارکن تھے، جو محمد علی جناح کے مشہور ساتھی اور اس وقت کے پنجاب، پاکستان کے گورنر تھے۔
42

پاکستان کا سب سے پرانا ہسپتال کونساہے

Correct Answer: میو ہسپتال
Show explanation
Explanation

  • میو ہسپتال لاہور، پنجاب، پاکستان کے قدیم اور بڑے ہسپتالوں میں سے ایک ہے۔

  • میو ہسپتال پاکستان کا سب سے پرانا ہسپتال ہے جسے کھولنے کی تاریخ 1871 ہے۔

  • In 2002, the Board of Governors took over the charge of the institution under PMHI Ordinance 2002, according to which the posts of Principal Executive Officer (PEO) / Dean and Deputy Dean were created.
43

The currency of pakistan is ?

Correct Answer: Rupee
Show explanation
Explanation
  • The rupee is the currency of Pakistan
  • ***
  • The first currency note issued by the State Bank of Pakistan was in the denomination of Rs 2
  • Brandley designed the first coin of Pakistan in 1948.
  • Pakistan’s first coin was issued on 3rd January 1948
  • The government of Pakistan issues currency on the basis of the Availability of gold in the country
  • ***
    • "enge" is the currency of which country Kazakhstan
    • Ringgit is the currency of Malaysia.
    • New Zealand Dollar is the currency of New Zealand.
    • US dollar is the currency of the USA.
    • Bhat is the currency of Thailand
    • won is the Currency of South Korea 
    • Hryvnia is the Currency of Ukraine
    • The dollar is the currency of the United States of America.
    • Euro is the currency of Austria and Cyprus
    • Kyat is the currency of which country Myanmar
44

Hunza Become part of Pakistan?

Correct Answer: 1947
Show explanation
Explanation
On 3 November 1947, Hunza became part of Pakistan
History
From November 1947 until 1974 was a princely state of Pakistan
It is a mountainous valley in Gilgit-Baltistan.
It is situated on the bank of the Hunza River.
It is popular for its snow-capped and rugged mountains.
Burushaski language is dominantly spoken in the Hunza region
45

بندرگاہ محمد بن قاسم کراچی سے ــــــــــــــــ فاصلے پر واقع ہے۔

Correct Answer: 35 کلومیٹر
Show explanation
Explanation

محمد بن قاسم بندرگاہ یا مقتدرہ قاسم بندرگاہ بحیرہ عرب پر کراچی سے 35 کلومیٹر مشرق کی جانب واقع ہے

46

پاکستان تحريک انصاف کا قيام کب عمل ميں آيا؟

Correct Answer: 1996
Show explanation
Explanation

پاکستان تحریک انصاف (پی ٹی آئی) پاکستان کی سیاسی جماعت ہے۔

جس کی بنیاد ایک سابقہ کرکٹ کھلاڑی عمران خان نیازی نے 25 اپریل 1996 کو رکھی

47

لیاقت باغ کہاں واقع ہے؟

Correct Answer: راولپنڈی
Show explanation
Explanation

یاقت باغ راولپنڈی میں واقع ہے۔

پہلے اس کا نام ایسٹ انڈیا کمپنی گارڈن تھا۔

پاکستان کے پہلے وزیر اعظم لیاقت علی خان اسی باغ میں قتل ہوئے تھے۔

48

پاکستان اور بھارت کے مابین 1960 میں کونسا معاہدہ طئے پایا؟

Correct Answer: سندھ طعاس معاہدہ
Show explanation
Explanation

Indus Water Treaty also known as Indus Basin Water Treaty was signed between India and Pakistan to resolve the water dispute on September 19, 1960 and brokered by the World Bank.


49

قائد اعظم نے ـــــــــــــ رپورٹ کے جواب میں اپنے چودہ نکات پیش کیئے تھے؟

Correct Answer: نہرو
Show explanation
Explanation

نہرو رپورٹ 1928 میں پیش کیا گیا جس کے جواب میں قائداعظم نے 1929 میں اپنے مشہور چودہ نکات پیش کیئے تھے۔ 

50

Among Jinnah’s 14 points, which point stated that Sindh should be separated from Bombay ?

Correct Answer: 9
Show explanation
Explanation

               List of Jinnah fourteen points (presents in 1929)

Title                               Description
Point 1:Federal System
Point 2:Provincial Autonomy
Point 3:Representation of Minorities
Point 4:Number of Muslim Representative
Point 5:Separate Electorates
Point 6:Muslim Majority Provinces
Point 7:Religious Liberty
Point 8:Three-Fourth Representation
Point 9:Separation of Sindh
Point 10:Introduction of Reforms in N.W.F.P and Baluchistan
Point 11:Government Services
Point 12:Protection of Muslim’s culture and Language
Point 13:One-Third Muslim Ministers
Point 14:Constitution
51

جون 1980 کو کس نے پاکستان میں زکات آرڈینینس نافذ کیا؟

Correct Answer: ضیا الحق
Show explanation
Explanation

صدرمملکت جنرل محمد ضیا ٗ الحق نے زکاة و عشر آرڈیننس 20جون 1980 کو جاری کیا

52

آل انڈیا مسلم لیگ بنانے کی تجویز کس نے پیش کی؟

Correct Answer: سر سلیم اللہ خان
Show explanation
Explanation

آل انڈیا مسلم لیگ کی بنیاد نواب خواجہ سمیع اللہ نے 30 دسمبر 1906 کو رکھی۔

جناح نے آل انڈیا مسلم لیگ کو 1913 میں جوائن کیا تھا۔

53

لارڈ ڈلہوزی نے 1854 میں کس محکمہ کی بنیاد رکھی؟

Correct Answer: محکمہ پبلک ورکس
Show explanation
Explanation

لارڈ ڈلہوزی نے 1854 میں محکمہ پبلک ورکس کی بنیاد رکھی۔

لارڈ ڈلہوزی ہندوستان کا گورنر جنرل تھا۔ 1848ء میں ہندوستان آیا۔ اس کے عہد میں برما اور سکھوں کی دوسری لڑائی ہوئی اور پنجاب پر انگریزوں کا قبضہ ہو گیا

54

10 soldiers injured in _____ suicide attack on 4 July 2022?

Correct Answer: North Waziristan
Show explanation
Explanation

At least 10 security personnel were injured when a suicide bomber attacked a convoy of security forces in North Waziristan tribal district on July 4, 2022.

55

Which Hotel was attacked on 11th of May 2019 by BLA?

Correct Answer: PC Gawadar
Show explanation
Explanation

On 11 May 2019, the BLA claimed responsibility for an attack on the Zaver Pearl-Continental Hotel in the port city of Gwadar.

56

Which bank given the best bank award for 2019?

Correct Answer: Bank Al-Falah
Show explanation
Explanation

Bank Al-Falah was given the best bank award for the year 2019.



57

Pakistan on 23rd, May 2019 successfully conducted a “training launch” of a ballistic missile __________ capable of carrying both nuclear and conventional warheads up to _________ kilometers.

Correct Answer: Shaheen II, 1,500 kilometers
Show explanation
Explanation

On 23rd, May 2019 Pakistan successfully conducted a “training launch” of a ballistic missile Shaeen ii capable of carrying both nuclear and conventional warheads up to 1500 kilometers.

58

On which date (UNSC) held an urgent meeting to review the situation arising out of the Aug 5, 2019, siege of Kashmir by India?

Correct Answer: August 5, 2020
Show explanation
Explanation

The UN Security Council (UNSC) held an urgent meeting on August 5, 2020 to review the situation arising out of the Aug 5, 2019, siege of Kashmir by India.

59

In 2019, how much IMF promised to give loan to Pakistan?

Correct Answer: 6 billions
Show explanation
Explanation

On 3 July 2019, International Monetary Fund (IMF) approved a three-year, $6 billion loan "to support Pakistan’s economic plan.

On July 3, 2019, IMF approved a 39-month extended arrangement under the EFF for Pakistan 

ND12_8_2023



60

Which of the following Pakistani player has been named Most Valuable Cricketer of the Year 2020?

Correct Answer: Babar Azam
Show explanation
Explanation

Babar Azam, was declared as Most Valuable Cricketer of the Year and also clinched the title of White-ball Cricketer of the Year as the Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) , announced the awards for the year 2020

61

Which province on July 22, 2020 handed over a 200-year-old gurdwara to the Sikh community?

Correct Answer: Balochistan
Show explanation
Explanation

The Balochistan government on July 22, 2020 handed over a 200-year-old gurdwara to the Sikh community.

62

Recently, Pakistan, Iran set __________ trade target by 2023

Correct Answer: $5 billion
Show explanation
Explanation

Pakistan and Iran have agreed to take measures to expand the annual trade exchanges to $5 billion by the year 2023.

63

Which is the top-ranked Pakistani institute in the latest edition of QS World University Rankings 2023?

Correct Answer: NUST Islamabad
Show explanation
Explanation

13 Pakistani universities have made it into the QS World University Rankings for 2023 released in June 2022, with the National University of Sciences And Technology (NUST) Islamabad being the top-ranked Pakistani institute out of 1,500 universities from around the world.

64

کس نے 1881 میں فیکٹری ایکٹ منظور کیا جس کے مطابق بچوں کے لئے کارخانوں میں نو گھنٹے اوقات کار مقرر کیئے اور خطرناک مشینری کو محفوظ کرنے کا حکم دیا؟

Correct Answer: لارڈ رپن
Show explanation
Explanation
  • لارڈ رپن نے 1881 میں فیکٹری ایکٹ منظور کیا جس کے مطابق بچوں کے لئے کارخانوں میں نو گھنٹے اوقات کار مقرر کیئے اور خطرناک مشینری کو محفوظ کرنے کا کم دیا.
  • لارڈ رپن 1880 سے لیکر 1884 تک انڈیا کے گورنر جنرل رئے۔
65

India won Asia Cup by defeating Pakistan by how many wickets?

Correct Answer: 5
Show explanation
Explanation
  • India defeated Pakistan by five wickets in T20 in Asia Cup.
  • Match played:  28 August 2022
  • Match played: at the Dubai Cricket Stadium in the United Arab Emirates (UAE)

66

When Pakistan declared national emergency in the face of calamitous floods?

Correct Answer: 25 August 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

Calling the incessant monsoon rains a `climate-inducted humanitarian crisis of epic proportions`, the Pakistan government on August 25, 2022 officially declared a `national emergency` in light of the rain-induced floods which have so far killed 1000 people.

 

67

In which city `Dry port` complex project was inaugurated in August 2022?

Correct Answer: Mirpur
Show explanation
Explanation

Azad Jammu and Kashmir President Barrister Sultan Mahmood and Prime Minister Sardar Tanveer Ilyas on August 24, 2022 jointly performed the groundbreaking of the long awaited `dry port complex` in Mirpur.

 


68

Who is the current Director General Public Relations Pakistan Air Force (DGPR PAF)?

Explanation

Air Vice Marshal Aurangzeb Ahmed has been appointed as Director General Public Relations Pakistan Air Force on 25 August 2022.



69

In the year 1719 how many Mughal Kings sat on throne?

Correct Answer: 4

71

In order to make aware the Indians of the modern sciences, the British established educational institution. In 1857, universities were established in Madras, Calcutta and:

Correct Answer: Bombay
Show explanation
Explanation

The Universities of Calcutta, Bombay, and Madras were established as the outcome of Sir Charles Wood’s dispatch. The first three universities in India Calcutta, Madras, and Bombay were established in 1857.

72

Saudi crown conferred Order of King King Abdulaziz on ________ in June 2022.

Correct Answer: Qamar Javed Bajwa
Show explanation
Explanation

Chief of Army Staff (COAS) General Qamar Javed Bajwa was awarded the King Abdulaziz Medal of Excellent Class, an order of merit named after Saudi Arabia's founder, on 26 June 2022 by Saudi Crown Price Muhammad Bin Salman.

 

73

Which country awarded Qamar Javed Bajwa King Abdulaziz Medal in June 2022?

Correct Answer: Saudi Arabia
Show explanation
Explanation

COAS General Qamar Javed Bajwa was awarded the King Abdulaziz Medal of Excellent Class,

an order of merit named after Saudi Arabia's founder, on 26 June 2022 by Saudi Crown Prince Muhammad Bin Salman.

ALL IMPORTANT QUESTION RELATED TO "QAMAR JAVED BAJWA""


Gen Qamar Javed Bajwa was Becomes the 10th COAS from 29 November 2016 to 29 November 2022.

General Qamar Javed Bajwa retires on November 29 after the completion of his six-year tenure

Appointed by: Nawaz Sharif

Predecessor: General Raheel Sharif

Born: 11 November 1960 (age 62) Karachi, Sindh, Pakistan

74

Which country achieved United Nations Climate Goal Action before 2030?

Correct Answer: Pakistan
Show explanation
Explanation

With technical support from UNDP, Pakistan has achieved SDG13 well before the 2030 deadline.

Sustainable Development Goal 13 is about climate action and is one of 17 Sustainable Development Goals established by the United Nations General Assembly in 2015.

ND04-08-2023

75

According to UN report, Climate change to cost Pakistan ______ annually.

Correct Answer: 26 billion dollars
Show explanation
Explanation

According to United Nations Economic and Social Commission for Asia and the Pacific (UN-ESCAP), Pakistan will have the highest losses as a percentage of GDP at 9.1 percent.

76

According to a recent report in 2022, Pakistan and which country is the most vulnerable to climate change?

Correct Answer: India
Show explanation
Explanation

Extreme climatic conditions are threatening the food security in South Asia with escalated floods and droughts making India and Pakistan the most vulnerable to climate change

This report was published by Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change in 2022.

77

Mohenjo Daro is a _________ word meaning literally Mound of dead.

Correct Answer: Sindhi
Show explanation
Explanation

Mohenjo-daro, the modern name for the site, has been interpreted as "Mound of the Dead Men" in Sindhi.

78

After 1857 which language was declared an official language in India?

Correct Answer: Hindi, along with English
Show explanation
Explanation

After 1857 Hindi, along with the English language was declared an official language in India.

79

Correct Answer: 17 August 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

  • The deal was signed on 17 August 2022.
80

Correct Answer: Netherlands and Hong Kong

Pakistan qualified for the knock-out stage of the World Junior Team Squash Championship by beating Guyana, Netherlands and Hong Kong on 17-18 August 2022.

81

Pakistan qualified for the knock-out stage of the World Junior Team Squash Championship by beating _______ in August 2022?

Correct Answer: All of these
Show explanation
Explanation

Pakistan qualified for the knock-out stage of the World Junior Team Squash Championship by beating Guyana, Netherlands and Hong Kong on 17-18 August 2022.

Order of Zayed also known: Order of the Union Medal

86

National Assembly passed the Finance (Supplementary) Bill, 2021, termed widely as a “mini-budget?

Correct Answer: 13 January 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

National Assembly passed the Finance (Supplementary) Bill, 2021, termed widely as a “mini-budget on 13 January 2022.

The House also passed the State Bank of Pakistan (Amendment) Bill 2021 on 13-01-2022.



87

The then PM Imran khan announced which civil award for workers who tried to save Sri Lankan man from the mob?

Correct Answer: Tagmha i shujaat
Show explanation
Explanation

The then Prime Minister Imran Khan announced that the Tamgha-i-Shujaat will be conferred on Malik Adnan — a colleague of the Sri Lankan man lynched by a mob in Sialkot on 3 December 2021.

Malik Adnan tried to save the 49-year-old factory manager Priyantha Kumara Diyawadana.


88

Who offers the funeral prayer of Dr. A Q Khan?

Correct Answer: Prof Dr Ahmad Al-Ghazali
Show explanation
Explanation

Prof Dr Ahmad Al-Ghazali is the Honorable Member, Shariat Appellate Bench

*****

Dr. Abdul Qadeer was born on 1st April, 1936 in Bhopal, India

Prof Dr Ahmad Al-Ghazali offer the funeral prayer of Dr. A Q Khan

What was the title given to Dr Abdul Qadeer Khan? Mohsin-e-Pakistan

Dr Abdul Qadeer Khan died on 10 October 2021, at the age of 85 after being transferred to a hospital in Islamabad with lung problems.

Tehreek-e-Tahaffuz-e-Pakistan (TTP) was a political party in Pakistan founded and led by nuclear scientist Abdul Qadeer Khan.  In September 2013, the party was dissolved by Abdul Qadeer Khan.

89

The Nobel laureate Malala Yousafzai got married on______?

Correct Answer: 9 November 2021
Show explanation
Explanation

Nobel Peace Prize winner Malala Yousafzai has "tied the knot" with her partner Asser Malik during an Islamic ceremony in Birmingham. 

Nobel laureate Malala Yousafzai got married on 9 November 2021 (Allama Iqbal Birthday)

90

Nobel Prize laureate Malala Yousafzai announced her marriage with the person named?

Correct Answer: Asser Malik
Show explanation
Explanation

Nobel Peace Prize winner Malala Yousafzai has "tied the knot" with her partner Asser Malik during an Islamic ceremony in Birmingham. 

Nobel laureate Malala Yousafzai got married on 9 November 2021 

About Malala Yousafzai

Born: 1997

Belongs: Mingora, Swat

Received Noble Prize in 2014

She is the youngest Nobel Prize laureate 

International Malala Day is observed every year on July 12 

celebrate the life and legacy of Pakistani education activist and Nobel laureate Malala Yousafzai.

Malala Day theme 2023:  I am Malala

ND06-08-2023


91

In which city Pakistan’s First Commercial Court inaugurated?

Correct Answer: Lahore
Show explanation
Explanation

Chief Justice of Pakistan Gulzar Ahmad inaugurated the country’s first commercial court here at Lahore Judicial Complex on 05.06.2021

Purpose: The cases relating to businesses needed to be decided without delay as they had an indirect effect on the economy.
92

Which cyclone disturbed Test Matches between Pakistan and Bangladesh?

Correct Answer: Cyclone Jawad
Show explanation
Explanation

Test between Bangladesh and Pakistan was washed out due to persistent rain in Dhaka due to the effects of cyclone Jawad in December 2021.

93

Cyclone Jawad disturbed Test Matches between Pakistan and ________ in December.

Correct Answer: Bangladesh
Show explanation
Explanation

Test between Bangladesh and Pakistan was washed out due to persistent rain in Dhaka due to the effects of cyclone Jawad in December 2021.

94

'Cyclone in Pakistan' is a poetical work by:

Correct Answer: Sunita Namjoshi
Show explanation
Explanation

Suniti Namjoshi is an Indian poet and a fabulist. 

95

Senate elections take place in accordance with the Article ____________ of the Constitution:

Correct Answer: 59
Show explanation
Explanation

Senate elections take place in accordance with Article 59 of the Constitution.

Each of the four provincial assemblies shall elect in the next Senate election 23 members from their respective provinces that include 14 on general seats,

four on seats reserved for technocrats including Ulema, 04 on seats reserved for women and one on seat reserved for non-Muslims.

96

Article 25 (A) of constitution of Pakistan deals with:

Correct Answer: Right to education
Show explanation
Explanation

In 2010, Article 25-A of the Pakistani Constitution was created, stating that "The State shall provide free and compulsory education to all children of the age of five to sixteen years in such manner as may be determined by law."

97

Which province will provide free education till graduation?

Correct Answer: Punjab
Show explanation
Explanation

Punjab Chief Minister Parvez Elahi on August 14, 2022 announced free education up to graduation in state-run educational institutes.

98

It forms Khanpur Lake, a reservoir which supplies drinking water to Islamabad and Rawalpindi and irrigation water to many of the agricultural and industrial areas.

Height: 51 m

Opened: 1984

105

Zulfikar Ali Bhutto served as the_________Prime Minister of Pakistan from 1973 to 1977?

Correct Answer: 9th
Show explanation
Explanation

Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto was the ninth prime minister of Pakistan from 1973 to 1977

Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto was the fourth and ninth president of Pakistan from 20 December 1971 - 14 August 1973

the first term: from 1971 to 1973

the second term: from 1973 to 1977

**


He was the founder of the Pakistan People's Party

Nickname: Quaid-e-Awam ("the People's Leader")

Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto was Born on January 5, 1928, in Larkana

Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto was hanged to death on 4 April 1979 District Jail Rawalpindi

Resting place: Bhutto family mausoleum

Children:

Benazir Bhutto

Sanam Bhutto

Murtaza Bhutto

Shahnawaz Bhutto

**

Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto History 

7th Speaker of the National Assembly from 14 April 1972 – 15 August 1972

8th and 12th Minister of Foreign Affairs from 15 June 1963  – 28 March 1977

Minister of Commerce from 28 October 1958 – 16 January 1960

ND15-10-2023


106

Before 1977 elections on January 5,Bhutto announced as the 2nd plan of___ reforms but these could not be implemented?

Correct Answer: Labor reforms
Show explanation
Explanation

On 2 January 1972 Bhutto announced the nationalisation of all major industries, including iron and steel, heavy engineering, heavy electricals, petrochemicals, cement and public utilities.

A new labour policy was announced increasing workers' rights and the power of trade unions

Correct Answer: 134.8 Million

Pakistan, officially the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, is a country in South Asia.

It is the world's fifth-most populous country with a population exceeding 212.2 million.

It is the world's second-largest Muslim population.

Correct Answer: Thrice

First amendment in 1973 Constitution: May 1974 (about boundaries)  

Second amendment in 1973 Constitution: September 1974 (about Qadiani)  

Third amendment in 1973 Constitution: Feb 1975 (about empowerment of parliament)

Its main functions are funding, overseeing, regulating and accrediting the higher education institutions in the country.

Police Rank    Abbreviation    BPS  
Inspector General of Police IGP 22
Additional Inspector General  Addl: IG   21

Head Constable    HC    9
Constable    FC    07

The national flower of Belgium is:

Correct Answer: Red Poppy
Show explanation
Explanation

The national creature of Belgium is the lion which is appeared on the symbol of the nation. Another image is the Common Kestrel which is the national winged creature. Red Poppy is another symbol and the national flower, whereas Taxus baccata is the national tree of the nation. Moules-Frites, the most dish of mussels and fries, is the foremost famous dish and another image of the nation, beside Jenever, the juniper-flavored conventional alcohol, as the national drink.

Sir Creek is important to Pakistan because:

Correct Answer: It is environmentally important to prevent coastal wetlands from degradation

The creek, which opens up into the Arabian Sea, divides the Kutch region of the Indian state of Gujarat with the Sindh province of Pakistan.

148

In Commonwealth Games 2022, Overall Pakistan finished at ____ on the medal table out of 72 participating nations.

Correct Answer: 18
Show explanation
Explanation

Pakistan competed at the 2022 Commonwealth Games in Birmingham, England from 28 July to 8 August 2022. It was Pakistan’s 14th appearance at the Commonwealth Games. Overall Pakistan finished at 18 on the medal table out of 72 participating nations. Pakistan wins a total of 8 Medals in CWG 2022. Out of 8 medals, Pakistan wins 2 Gold, 3 Silver, and 3 Bronze medals.

 

149

Which death anniversary of Ruth Pfau observed on 10 August 2022?

Correct Answer: Fifth
Show explanation
Explanation

The 5th death anniversary of the German doctor, Ruth Pfau who dedicated her life to eradicate leprosy in Pakistan, was observed on 10 August 2022.

Ruth Pfau was a German–Pakistani Catholic nun of the Society of the Daughters of the Heart of Mary, and a physician.

Ruth Pfau moved from Germany to Pakistan in 1961.

Ruth Pfau was honoured with the Hilal-i-Pakistan-, Hilal-i-Imtiaz-, Nishan-i-Quaid-i-Azam-, and the Sitara-i-Quaid-i-Azam award for her services to Pakistan.

Dr Pfau, who was hailed as the Mother Teresa of Pakistan, passed away on 10 August 2017 in Karachi.

Correct Answer: Fourth
Show explanation
Explanation

Ruth Pfau was a German–Pakistani Catholic nun of the Society of the Daughters of the Heart of Mary, and a physician.

Ruth Pfau moved from Germany to Pakistan in 1961.

Ruth Pfau was honoured with the Hilal-i-Pakistan-, Hilal-i-Imtiaz-, Nishan-i-Quaid-i-Azam-, and the Sitara-i-Quaid-i-Azam award for her services to Pakistan.

Dr Pfau, who was hailed as the Mother Teresa of Pakistan, passed away on 10 August 2017 in Karachi.

Ayub Khan died in Islamabad in April 1974.

Ayub Khan's election symbol was Red Rose

He went on to study at Aligarh Muslim University (AMU)

Ayub Khan was an army general who seized the presidency from Iskander Mirza in a coup in 1958

18.   The National Vocational and Technical Training Commission (Amendment) Bill, 2021

Which state declined to export arms to India due to its poor human rights record in 2021?

Correct Answer: Germany
Show explanation
Explanation

In February 2021, Germany declined the license to two firms planning the export of small arms to India due to the Indian army’s poor human rights record in Indian Illegally Occupied Jammu and Kashmir (IIOJ&K).

Though Germany is India’s sixth-largest trading partner

and its largest trading partner from the European Union, it feared that its small arms could be used against the civilian population in IIOJK.

Captain Muhammad Sarwar Cause of Death: Indo-Pakistani War of 1947–48.

Captain Raja Muhammad Sarwar Bhatti NH, BS, best known as Muhammad Sarwar, was an officer in the Pakistan Army

was cited with the first Nishan-i-Haider during the first war between India and Pakistan in 1947–48.

Raja Muhammad Sarwar Bhatti was born in a small village, Singhori, Gujar Khan, Rawalpindi District, on 10 November 1910,

Captain Muhammad Sarwar  Died on 27 July 1948 (aged 37) in Uri, Jammu and Kashmir in India

Captain Muhammad Sarwar was Buried at the Hill of Tilpatra near Uri, Jammu, and Kashmir in India

Correct Answer: Pakistan

The 44th Chess Olympiad will see over 1,700 players from 188 nations compete in Chennai, India from 28 July until August 10.

Out of the 32, eight officers belonged to the Army's Medical Corps.

Director General,

Correct Answer: February 24, 2022

two-day official visit

met with Putin on 24-02-2022.

Reason 

 Vladimir Putin met  Imran Khan in Moscow, as Russian forces continued their invasion of Ukraine, with the latter expressing “regret” that a military conflict was not averted, according to a Pakistani statement

Correct Answer: 1st Jan 1981

1st Jan 1981 interest-Free Banking was introduced in Pakistan first time.

From July 1, 1985, all commercial banking in Pak Rupees was made interest-free. 

In 1985 the President of Pakistan Mohammad Zia-ul-Haq introduced an interest-free banking system in Pakistan

Meezan Bank is interest-free in Pakistan.

How many Cantonment Boards are there in Pakistan?

Correct Answer: 42

ملک بھر میں ٹوٹل 42 کینٹونمینٹ بورڈز موجود ہیں

جس میں 19 پنجاب، 9 کے پی کے ، 8 سندھ ، 3 بلوچستان اور 3 گلگت میں موجود ہیں

ان تمام 42 بورڈز کو  مزید 212 وارڈز میں تقسیم کئے گئے ہیں۔

ان کے ساتھ تقریبا 21 لاکھ ووٹرز رجسٹرڈ ہیں۔

The headquarters is in Islamabad, Pakistan 

The NACTA 2013 Act sets up the framework of the organization

241

How many Pakistanis won Dianna Award 2022?

Correct Answer: 10
Show explanation
Explanation

The Diana Award honours those aged between 9 to 25 working for the betterment of the community in any way.

Dianna Awarded founded by Gordon Brown (the then PM of United Kingdom) in 1999.

The 10 Diana awardees 2022 from Pakistan are:

1.       Alizey Khan

2.       Arqam Al-Hadee

3.       Iqra Bisma

4.       Faryal Ashfaq

5.       Muhammad Amir Khoso

6.       Moazzam Shah Bukhari Syed

7.       Moiz Lakhani

8.       Aiza Abid

9.       Ramna Saeed

10.   Sikander Khan.

Where Benazir Bhutto’s monument to be built in 2022?

Former prime minister and Pakistan People’s Party (PPP) chairperson Benazir Bhutto’s monument will be constructed at Liaquat Bagh, Rawalpindi before December 2022.

243

When Pakistan announced it succeeded in producing weapon-grade

Correct Answer: March 1948
Show explanation
Explanation

 March 1948

From May 28-30, 1998, Pakistan conducted up to six nuclear tests. According to a statement from the Pakistani government, the nuclear test equipment contained "uranium-235" called "weapons-grade uranium" (WGU, uranium rich in more than 90% uranium-235). The  uranium was produced at the Khan Research Laboratories (KRL), called the Kafta Plant, near Islamabad, according to a statement. Pakistan's tests remove doubts about its ability to produce nuclear weapons, but Pakistan's WGU stockpile estimates are full of significant uncertainty.

244

Second edition of Kashmir Premier League will be played:

Correct Answer: August 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

Kashmir Premier League first edition held: from August, 6 to 17 2021, in Muzaffarabad, A J & K.

Kashmir Premier League second edition expected to beheld: from August, 1 to 25 2022

245

. Due to the US pressure, uranium-enriching programme was frozen between 1994 and?

Correct Answer: 1997

1997

Correct Answer: April 2011

with further tests in May 2012, February 2013, November 2013, September 2014, and July 2017.

ECL stands for Exit Control List

Parent agency: Ministry of Interior (Pakistan) and Federal Investigation Agency

Correct Answer: June 29 2022

252

With which country Pakistan signed a debt suspension deal in June 2022?

Correct Answer: France
Show explanation
Explanation

Pakistan and France signed an agreement for the suspension of loans amounting to $107 million under the G20 Debt Service Suspension Initiative (DSSI) on 27 June 2022.

253

When Innovation Hub Program in Islamabad was launched?

Correct Answer: July 1 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

Prime Minister Muhammad Shehbaz Sharif formally inaugurated Innovation Hub Program in Islamabad on 1 July 2022.

254

Government of Pakistan issues currency on the basis of:

Correct Answer: Availability of gold in the country
Show explanation
Explanation

 Availability of gold in the country

Under Article 24, the State Bank of Pakistan has the sole right to issue banknotes. The National Bank of Pakistan introduced the first urgent issue at face value of 5, 10,  100 rupees. It was printed by De La Rue & Company Great Britain and published between 1948 and 1960.



255

Which property the paper money does not possess?

Correct Answer: Durability
Show explanation
Explanation

Durability


Banknotes and "fiat money" also have no intrinsic value. Their value is determined only by supply and demand and becomes legal tender by government legislation. The most important factor that distinguishes the currency of one country from the currency of another is its value.

256

A tariff:

Correct Answer: Reduces the volume of trade
Show explanation
Explanation

Reduces the volume of trade

Tariffs are government-imposed taxes on goods and services imported from other countries that aim to raise prices, make imports less desirable, or at least less competitive, compared to domestic goods and services.

257

Which of the following would cause income to become more unequal?

Correct Answer: More regressive taxes
Show explanation
Explanation

More regressive taxes

Factors that contribute to income inequality are closely linked to economic, social and political causes. People have different wages for each job, leading to income inequality. People of different levels of education often earn different wages, but their social situation can be different as they grow up.

258

Pakistani first ever mixed martial arts (MMA) fight winner Antia Karim belongs to:

Correct Answer: Hunza
Show explanation
Explanation

Pakistan’s MMA fighter Anita Karim beats Aussie opponent in Thailand in June 2022.

259

23rd March celebrated as _____ occasion of Qarar-e-Dad of Pakistan in 2022?

Correct Answer: 82rd
Show explanation
Explanation

23 March is known as Pakistan Day or Pakistan Resolution Day, also Republic Day.

Pakistan Day is a public holiday in Pakistan to commemorate the 23rd March Lahore Resolution

adopted in 1940 at Lahore Minto Park, And also the adoption of Pakistan’s First Constitution on 23 March 1956


260

When President Arif Alvi approved Finance Bill 2022?

Correct Answer: June 30th 2022

276

When Pakistan Resolution was presented in 1940, Sardar _______ supported the same in a very efficient way/manner.

Correct Answer: None of these
Show explanation
Explanation

At the 27th Session of the Muslim League at Lahore on March 23, 1940, Sir Haji Abdullah Haroon was among those who spoke and endorsed the Pakistan Resolution.

The Resolution was seconded by Maulana Zafar Ali Khan from Punjab,

Sardar Aurangzeb from the N. W. F. P. ,

Sir Abdullah Haroon from Sindh,

and Qazi Esa from Baluchistan, along with many others.

Muhammad Ali Jauhar, was an Indian Muslim activist, prominent member of the All-India Muslim League, journalist and a poet, and was among the leading figures of the Khilafat Movement. Mohammad Ali Jauhar was a product of the Aligarh Movement. 

Born: December 10, 1878, Rampur, India

Died: January 4, 1931, London, United Kingdom

Saudi Arabia conferred upon _______ King Abdulaziz Medal on 26 June 2022.

283

A person who has held office as a permanent Judge of a High Court cannot plead or act in any court or before any authority in India except the Supreme Court. A person is not qualified for appointment as a Judge of a High Court in India unless he has for at least five years held a judicial office in the territory of India. Which of the statements given above is | are correct?

Correct Answer: I only
Show explanation
Explanation
A person who has held office as a permanent Judge of a High Court cannot plead or act in any court or before any authority in India except the Supreme Court. A person is not qualified for appointment as a Judge of a High Court in India unless he has for at least five years held a judicial office in the territory of India. Which of the statements given above is | are correct?

ایک شخص جس نے ہائی کورٹ کے مستقل جج کے طور پر عہدہ سنبھالا ہے وہ سپریم کورٹ کے علاوہ کسی بھی عدالت میں یا کسی بھی اتھارٹی کے سامنے درخواست یا کارروائی نہیں کر سکتا۔ کوئی شخص ہندوستان میں ہائی کورٹ کے جج کے طور پر تقرری کے لیے اہل نہیں ہے جب تک کہ اس نے ہندوستان کی سرزمین میں کم از کم پانچ سال تک عدالتی دفتر نہ رکھا ہو۔ اوپر دیئے گئے بیانات میں سے کون سا ہے | صحیح ہیں؟

287

How many seats allocated to the Kashmiri refugees settled in Pakistan in AJK assembly out of 45 General Seats?

Correct Answer: 12
Show explanation
Explanation

More than 700 candidates from 32 political and religious parties are contesting for the 45 general seats.

Of the 45 general seats, 12 seats are reserved for Kashmiri refugees who had migrated from the Indian Illegally Occupied Jammu and Kashmir (IIOJK) in 1947 and 1965 and are settled in various parts of Pakistan.
288

PAEC was set up in which year?

Correct Answer: 1956

Who was the first chairman of PAEC?

Correct Answer: Dr. Nazir Ahmed
Show explanation

 Dr. Nazir Ahmed

When the Energy Council Act was fully enforced, Prime Minister Hussain Shaheed established the Pakistan Atomic Energy Commission (PAEC) in March 1956. Its first chair was experimental physicist Nazir Ahmad.

The IBM Personal Computer AT, more commonly known as the IBM AT

IBM's second-generation PC,

it designed around the 6 MHz Intel 80286 microprocessor 

it was released in 1984 as System Unit 5170.

293

Canadians stopped supplying fuel and spares for KANUPP in:

Correct Answer: 1976
Show explanation
Explanation

1976

On  December 23, 1976, Canada terminated its nuclear cooperation with Pakistan and stopped shipping nuclear fuel, heavy water, spare parts and technical information. Canada's decision was based on Pakistan's signing of  the NPT and its failure to accept safeguards for the entire nuclear program.

294

The work on enrichment plant began in:

Correct Answer: 1976
Show explanation
Explanation

1976

A Kahuta facility in Pakistan, established in 1976. Pakistan, led by Khan, has developed an extensive secret network  to obtain the  materials and techniques needed to develop its  uranium enrichment capacity.

300

Which of the following events was not associated with the year1920?

Correct Answer: Chauri chaura incident
Show explanation
Explanation

Chauri chaura incident

The Chauri Chaura incident occurred at Chauri Chaura in the Gorakhpur district of the United Province, (modern Uttar Pradesh) in British India on 4 February 1922, when a large group of protesters, participating in the Non-cooperation movement, clashed with police, who opened fire.

Chauri Chaura came to prominence during the struggle for Indian independence after a violent incident between the British Indian police and political activists.

301

The NA unanimously passed a bill titled `The Code of Criminal Procedure (Amendment) Act 2022?

Correct Answer: June 8th 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

After the Senate, the National Assembly on June 8, 2022 also gave its nod to a bill that seeks separation of the judiciary and the executive, clipping the judicial powers of assistant commissioners, the deputy commissioner and the commissioner of Islamabad.

Correct Answer: None of above

On  August 15, 1947, the day after India's separation, Khan became Pakistan's first prime minister. From 1947 to his assassination in 1951, he also held the Cabinet portfolio as Secretary of State, Secretary of Defense, and Minister of Borders and Regions.

306

In Delhi proposal Quaid-e-Azam fore go

Correct Answer: Separate electorate
Show explanation
Explanation

Seperate electrorate

Tensions between  Hindus and  Muslims have increased since 1922. Seeing that  Hindus do not tend to cooperate with  Muslims, Quaid invited Indian Islamic leaders  to meet in Delhi under his president. The conference was held on  March 20, 1927, resulting in proposals between Delhi and Muslims, unanimously accepted by all Islamic leaders.

When was Pakistan placed in Grey List of FATF for the first time?

312

Indian elections 2019 are going to bet held in

Correct Answer: None of above
Show explanation
Explanation

None of these

From April 11th to May 19th, 2019, a general election was held in India  to select members of the 17th Lok Sabha in seven stages. Votes were counted and the results were announced on May 23. Approximately 912 million people are eligible to vote, with turnout exceeding 67%. This is the highest and highest turnout of women ever.

313

The Fall of Baghdad was happened in:

Correct Answer: 1258 A.D
Show explanation
Explanation
  • January 29, 1258
  • The Siege of Baghdad was a siege that took place in Baghdad in 1258 and lasted 13 days from January 29, 1258 to February 10, 1258.
  • The siege, carried out by Mongolian Ilkhanate forces and allied troops, involved the investment, capture and sack of Baghdad, then the capital of the Abbasid Caliphate.

Hafiz Saeed
حافظ سعید

Hafiz Muhammad Saeed

5 June 1950 (age 72)[1]

318

This group was responsible for the kidnapping of 16 foreign tourists in Abyan, Yemen in December 1998

Correct Answer: Aden-Abyan Islamic Army
Show explanation
Explanation

Aden-Abyan Islamic Army, Yemen-based Islamist militant group that has been implicated in several acts of terrorism since the late 1990s.

It is most recognized for its involvement in the 2000 bombing of the USS Cole.

Aden-Abyan was formed sometime in the mid-1990s as a loose guerrilla network of a few dozen men, with a mix of veterans of the Soviet-Afghan war and Islamists from various countries.

In May 1998 the group issued the first of a series of political and religious statements on Yemeni and world affairs.

In December 1998 Aden-Abyan kidnapped a party of 16 Western tourists 16 Western tourists in southern Yemen, four of whom later died during a botched rescue by Yemeni security forces.

In 1999 group leader Zayn al-Abidin al-Mihdhar (Abu al-Hassan) was executed for his role in the kidnapping

Razia Sultana was assassinated in?

Correct Answer: Kaithal
Show explanation
Explanation

Razia Sultana mother name: Turkan Khatun

Razia Sultana was: First Woman Ruler

320

Mangla dam constructed on River Jhelum is to the help of World Bank is located in:

Correct Answer: Kashmir
Show explanation
Explanation

The Mangla Dam is situated on the Jhelum River 

It is the seventh-largest dam in the world.

Mangla Dam constructed on River Jhelum is to the help of the World Bank is located in Kashmir

Mangra Dam is a multipurpose dam on the  Jhelum River in the Milpool district of Pakistan.

Mangra Dam is named after the nearby village of Mangra.

Construction was started in 1961 and it was completed in 1967.

Mangla Dam has 5 tunnels and a power station

Correct Answer: 600 kilometers

Correct Answer: February 2020
Show explanation

Show explanation
Explanation

362

Correct Answer: May 26th 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

364

How many Pakistanis awarded UN medals of courage in May 2022__________?

Correct Answer: 6
Show explanation
Explanation

Six Pakistanis were among 117 UN peacekeepers who were awarded UN medals of courage on May 26, 2022 for sacrificing their lives for the cause of peace.

 Five of the six Tahir Ikram, Tahir Mehmood, Mohammed Naeem, Adil Jan and Mohammed Shafiq were from the armed forces, while the sixth, Ibrar Syed, was a civilian.

365

Iran was the first to recognize Pakistan.

381

Path: highway

Correct Answer: Brook:River
Show explanation
Explanation

A path is a little road (often so small that only one person can use it at a time),

while a highway is a large road with room for thousands.

A brook and a river have a similar size relationship.

382

Murre of Sindh is called to __________?

Correct Answer: Gorkh Hill Station
Show explanation
Explanation

Gorakh Hill Station is situated on one of the highest plateaus of Sindh.

The area is part of the Kirthar Mountain Range that makes the border between Sindh and Baluchistan provinces in Pakistan.

Sadiq Garh Palace is in_________?

Punjab member: 1

Sindh member: 1

Balochistan member: 1

Total members: 04

Explanation

387

Which session of Council of Foreign Ministers of OIC held in Pakistan in March 2022?

Correct Answer: 48th
Show explanation
Explanation

The Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) held the 48th Session of the Council of Foreign Ministers (CFM) under the theme (Building Partnerships for Unity, Justice, and Development) in Pakistan, on March 22-23, 2022.

388

The period of 1979 to 1989 of Pakistan is known as era of___________?

Correct Answer: Non-alignment
Show explanation
Explanation

The Non-Aligned Movement (NAM) was created and founded during the collapse of the colonial system and the independence struggles of the peoples of Africa, Asia, Latin America and other regions of the world and at the height of the Cold War.


389

The period of 1963 to 1978 of Pakistan is known as era of_________?

Correct Answer: Bilateralism
Show explanation
Explanation

Trade or diplomatic relations between two countries

390

The period of 1954 to 1962 of Pakistan is known as era of_______?

Correct Answer: Alliances
Show explanation
Explanation

The period of 1954 to 1962 in Pakistan is known as the era of Alliances

An alliance, in international relations, is a formal agreement between two or more states for mutual support in case of war.

****

Pakistan – Era Of Alliances (1954 -1962)

Mutual Defense Assistance Agreement (1954)

Pakistan joined SEATO (South East Asian Treaty Organization) in 1954

Colombo Conference (1954)

CENTO (Central Treaty Organization) in 1955.

 Bandung Conference 1955

Pakistan’s Policy towards Suez Canal Crisis (from 1956 to 1958)

Custody of Gwadar 1958

Pak-US Agreement of Cooperation 1959

Kashmir in UN (1953-1957)

THE INDUS WATER TREATY 1960

NA23-7-2023

391

M4 moterway will link ______

Correct Answer: Faisalabad-Multan
Show explanation
Explanation

The M4  is a north–south motorway in Pakistan that connects the cities of Faisalabad and Multan.

The 309 km motorway also connects to the M2, M3 and M5 motorways.


392

The period of 1990 till present of Pakistan is known as era of_________?

Correct Answer: Post Cold War
Show explanation
Explanation

The post–Cold War era is a period of history that follows the end of the Cold War, which represents history after the 1991 fall of the Soviet Union.

393

The first Gazette of Pakistan was issued on August 15 , 1947?

Correct Answer: For appointment of Governor General of Pakistan
Show explanation
Explanation

The Gazette of Pakistan is the official newspaper of the Government of Pakistan.

The first issue of the Gazette of Pakistan was published in Karachi on August 14, 1947
.The Gazette was also issued on the 15th, but the first official publication was on the 14th. 
394

Jalal Uddin Akbar was the son of_____________?

Correct Answer: Nasir Uddin Hamayun
Show explanation
Explanation

Nasir-ud-Din Muhammad, was the second emperor of the Mughal Empire.

who ruled from 1530 to 1540 and again from 1555 to 1556.

395

پاکستان کا کل رقبہ کتنا ہے؟

Correct Answer: both a & b
Show explanation
Explanation

پاکستان ایک خود مختار اسلامی ملک ہے۔ 21 کروڑ کی آبادی کے ساتھ یہ دنیا کا پانچواں بڑی آبادی والا ملک ہے۔

881,913 مربع کلومیٹر (340,509 مربع میل) کے ساتھ یہ دنیا کا تینتیسواں بڑے رقبے والا ملک ہے۔

اس کے جنوب میں 1046 کلومیٹر (650 میل) کی ساحلی پٹی ہے جو بحیرہ عرب سے ملتی ہے۔ 

پاکستان کے مشرق ميں بھارت، شمال مشرق ميں چین اور مغرب ميں افغانستان اور ايران واقع ہيں

۔ پاکستان کو شمال میں ایک تنگ واخان راہداری تاجکستان سے جدا کرتی ہے جبکہ اس ملک کی سمندری سرحدی حدود عمان کے سمندری حدود سے بھی ملتی ہیں۔

OLD= 796,096

NEW= 881,913

*************

Baluchistan Area: 341,190

Punjab Area: 205,345

Sindh Area: 140,914

KPK Area: 101,741

The President-elect through the Electoral College for a five-year term.

Age of president of Pakistan not less than forty-five (45) years
425

پاکستان کو کتنے سال بعد پہلا آئین ملا؟

Correct Answer: 9

  مارچ 1956 کو پہلا آئین حاصل کیا۔

پاکستان کو 9 سال بعد پہلا آئین ملا

1956 Constitution was consist of 234 articles 13 parts and 6 schedules.

The Constitution of 1956 was the fundamental law of Pakistan from March 1956 until 1958 Pakistani

Show explanation
Explanation

سکندر مرزا نے پاکستان کا پہلا آئین اکتوبر 1958 کو منسوخ کیا تھا۔

پاکستان کو 9 سال بعد پہلا آئین ملا

1956 Constitution was consist of 234 articles 13 parts and 6 schedules.

The Constitution of 1956 was the fundamental law of Pakistan from March 1956 until 1958 Pakistani


428

ٹانڈہ ڈیم کہان واقع ہے؟

Correct Answer: کوہاٹ

Explanation

433

خیبر پختواہ اسیمبلی کے موجودہ اسپیکر کون ہیں؟

مشتاق غنی اگست 2018 میں اسپیکر کے پی کے اسمبلی منتخب ہوئے۔

مشتاق غنی کا تعلق ایبٹ آباد سے ہے۔

436

قومی اسیمبلی نے 1973 کے آئین کی منظوری کب دی؟

Correct Answer: August 1973
Show explanation
Explanation

Feature of the 1973 Constitution

1.      Bicameral Legislature.

2.      Fundamental Rights.

3.      Pakistan to be a Welfare State.

4.      A Written Constitution.

5.      Flexibility.

6.      Republican Form of Government.

7.      Federal Form of Government.

8.      Parliamentary Form of Government.

437

439

Muhammad Rafiq Tarar died after a prolonged illness at the age of 92.

He was the president of Pakistan from 1998 to 2001.

465

UBL Bank Timing in Ramadan 2022

Correct Answer: During the ensuing month of Ramadan-ul-Mubarak 1443 A.H., the following office hours will be observed in the State Bank of Pakistan, which will also be followed by all banks / DFIs / MFBs.
Show explanation
Explanation

UBL Bank Timing in Ramadan 2022 for Public Dealings

During the ensuing month of Ramadan-ul-Mubarak 1443 A.H., the following office hours will be observed in the State Bank of Pakistan, which will also be followed by all banks / DFIs / MFBs.

latest bank timings in Pakistan

According State Bank of Pakistan’s recent statement, from Monday to Thursday the banks will have working hours from 10:00 am to 1:30 pm for public deals.

Banks / MrBs are further advised to observe the following minimum business (banking) hours for puls dealing:

On Fridays, UBL Bank Timing in Ramadan 2022 for public dealing will be observed from 10:00 am to 1:00 pm without any break, said a notification issued by the SBP on Friday.

Today bank timing in Ramadan in different cities of Pakistan like Rawalpindi Islamabad, Faisalabad, Karachi, Lahore, Multan, Peshawar. sbp, hbl, ubl, meezan bank, mcb, silk bank, Ramadan Branch Timings.

Correct Answer: Mirpur Khas

Explanation

It is the 5th largest city in Sindh province and the 33rd largest city of Pakistan.

The city was built by Talpur rulers of Mankani branch. 

District: Mirpur Khas

Province: Sindh

Correct Answer: Sehwan Shareef

Lal Shahbaz Qalandar wrote several books in Persian and Arabic

Lal Shahbaz Qalandar was a Sufi saint and poet of present-day Pakistan and Afghanistan

The full name of Hazrat Lal Shahbaz Qalandar: Syed Shah Hussain Marwandi

Born: 1177, Marand, Iran

Died: February 19, 1274, Sehwān

Title: Qalandar

The shrine of Hazrat Laal Shahbaz Qalandar is situated in Sehwan Sindh

Correct Answer: 126
Show explanation

These awards include

  1. three Nishan-i-Imtiaz,
  2. two Hilal-i-Pakistan,
  3. six Hilal-i-Imtiaz,
  4. four Sitar-i-Pakistan,
  5. three Sitara-i-Shuja’at,
  6. 17 Sitara-i-Imtiaz,
  7. 39 President’s Award for Pride of Performance,
  8. three Sitara-i-Quaid-i-Azam,
  9. 17 Tamgha-i-Shuja’at,
  10. 31Tamgha-i-Imtiaz,
  11. one Tamgha-i-Quaid-i-Azam.

Headquarters located in Paris & founded in 1989.

FATF recently meeting held in Paris from 01-03-2022 to 04-03-2022.

FATF once again retained Pakistan on grey list.

*******

Pakistan needs 12 votes out of 39 to exit the “grey" list and move up to join countries that do not require monitoring.

Tomb of Makhdoom Bilawal is at___________?

Correct Answer: Dadu
Show explanation
Explanation

Makhdoom Bilawal Bin Jam Hassan Samo, was a sufi saint, philosopher and poet from Sindh, Pakistan.

He is also referred as Makhdum Bilal or Bilali Makhdum. 

Born: 1451, Dādu

Died: January 17, 1523  Dadu District

His shrine is at 'Baghban' near the town of Dadu Sindh, Pakistan.

495

Who was the First Muslim Governor of Lahore?

Correct Answer: Malik Ayyaz
Show explanation
Explanation
  • Malik Ayyaz, called Meliqueaz by the Portuguese, was a naval officer and governor of the city of Diu, in the mouth of the Gulf of Khambhat, circa 1507-1509 under the rule of Gujarat Sultanate.
  • He was one of the most distinguished warriors of his time.
496

سندھ طاس معاہدہ کس نے کروایا تھا؟

Correct Answer: ورلڈ بینک
Show explanation
Explanation

Indus Water Treaty also known as Indus Basin Water Treaty was signed between India and Pakistan to resolve the water dispute on September 19, 1960 and brokered by the World Bank.

The Indus Waters Treaty (IWT) was signed in Karachi on 19 September 1960 by Jawaharlal Nehru and Ayub Khan.


497

Kori Creek is in which District?

Correct Answer: Thatta
Show explanation
Explanation

This region belonging to India is a part of the Indus River Delta which lies across Gujarat state in India and Sindh in Pakistan.

Thatta is the district of sindh.

498

Qanoon e Shahadat 1984 was made by president on

Correct Answer: 28 Oct 1984
Show explanation
Explanation

This ordinance contains 166 Articles and is applicable both civil and criminal cases

499

According to 1973 constitution, what is the minimum age limit for voting?

Correct Answer: 18 years
Show explanation
Explanation

 In 1962 constitution (250 articles) minimum age limit for voting was 21 years whereas 1973 constitution (280 articles) minimum age limit for voting is 18 years.

500

After Argentina and Malaysia, which country plans to buy 12 JF-17 Jets from Pakistan?

Correct Answer: Iraq
Show explanation
Explanation

The Iraqi government is planning to acquire 12 JF-17A Block III fighters from Pakistan and has reportedly set aside more than $600 million in funding for the purchase

Nice work getting this far. Consistency beats intensity — come back tomorrow and keep stacking sets.
